sectionSubtitle: A complete toolkit built for the modern tech interview landscape.

features.title: 12-Week Structured Roadmap
features.description: A phased plan from system design foundations through mock interviews, with trackable progress at every step.

features.title: AI-Aware Interview Practice
features.description: Specific prep for AI-enabled interviews at companies like Meta and Canva. Learn to work with AI, not against it.

features.title: Behavioral & Leadership Stories
features.description: STAR method templates for senior and staff-level scenarios. Build your story bank with structured prompts.

features.title: Curated Courses & Channels
features.description: Handpicked Udemy courses and YouTube channels from ex-FAANG engineers covering every interview topic.

features.title: Practice Platforms & Tools
features.description: 12 platforms for coding practice, mock interviews, and AI-assisted preparation — all vetted and ranked.

features.title: Progress Tracking
features.description: Check off items as you go. Your progress syncs across sessions so you never lose your place.
